Operation 'SessionGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about what session information is returned and explicitly states the required SessionID parameter. Added details about return value structure and security filtering to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be available after the call.

data.current_description: Retrieves session information for a given session ID. Sensitive fields like UserPw and UserChallengeToken are automatically filtered out.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves session information for a given session ID. Returns session details including user information and authentication status. Sensitive fields like UserPw and UserChallengeToken are automatically filtered out for security. Requires a valid SessionID parameter.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what session information is returned and explicitly states the required SessionID parameter. Added details about return value structure and security filtering to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be available after the call.

message: Operation 'TicketCreate' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies what ticket properties can be set, clarifies that an initial article is required/included, and explicitly states the return values (ticket ID, ticket number, article ID). This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow and what data will be available after creation.

data.current_description: Creates a new ticket with an initial article. Supports dynamic fields and attachments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ticket with an initial article. Accepts ticket properties (title, queue, type, priority, etc.), an initial article content, optional dynamic field values, and file attachments. Returns the newly created ticket ID, ticket number, and article ID. The ticket is immediately available for subsequent operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies what ticket properties can be set, clarifies that an initial article is required/included, and explicitly states the return values (ticket ID, ticket number, article ID). This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow and what data will be available after creation.

message: Operation 'TicketSearch' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what search criteria are available and how to customize results. Enhanced version mentions the breadth of search parameters (35 available), clarifies the return format (array of IDs), and explains customization options for sorting and pagination. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

data.current_description: Searches for tickets matching the specified criteria. Returns an array of matching ticket IDs. Default sort is by Age descending with a limit of 500 results.
data.description_suggestion: Searches for tickets matching specified criteria such as state, priority, queue, customer, or custom attributes. Returns an array of matching ticket IDs sorted by Age descending (default). Supports up to 35 search parameters for flexible filtering. Default result limit is 500 tickets. Pagination and custom sorting can be configured via parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what search criteria are available and how to customize results. Enhanced version mentions the breadth of search parameters (35 available), clarifies the return format (array of IDs), and explains customization options for sorting and pagination. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

message: Operation 'TicketGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that TicketID is required, specifies what optional data can be included (articles with type filtering, dynamic fields, attachments), and explains the return structure. This helps AI agents understand what data is available and how to request specific information.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed information about one or more tickets, optionally including articles, dynamic fields, and attachments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for one or more tickets by ticket ID. Returns core ticket properties and optionally includes articles (communications), dynamic field values, and file attachments based on parameters. Supports filtering articles by type and retrieving specific article content. Requires valid TicketID parameter(s).
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that TicketID is required, specifies what optional data can be included (articles with type filtering, dynamic fields, attachments), and explains the return structure. This helps AI agents understand what data is available and how to request specific information.

message: Operation 'TicketHistoryGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about what history information is returned and what inputs are required. Enhanced version specifies that TicketID is required, clarifies the return format (chronological history entries with timestamps), explains what types of events are tracked, and reinforces the authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and access restrictions.

data.current_description: Retrieves the complete history of changes and events for one or more tickets. Requires agent authentication (not available to customer users).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete history of changes and events for one or more tickets by ticket ID, including state changes, property modifications, and article additions. Returns a chronological list of history entries with timestamps and details of each change. Requires agent authentication (not available to customer users). Supports filtering by ticket ID and optional parameters for customization.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what history information is returned and what inputs are required. Enhanced version specifies that TicketID is required, clarifies the return format (chronological history entries with timestamps), explains what types of events are tracked, and reinforces the authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and access restrictions.

Operation 'SessionGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about what session information is returned and explicitly states the required SessionID parameter. Added details about return value structure and security filtering to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be available after the call.

data.current_description: Retrieves session information for a given session ID. Sensitive fields like UserPw and UserChallengeToken are automatically filtered out.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves session information for a given session ID. Returns session details including user information and authentication status. Sensitive fields like UserPw and UserChallengeToken are automatically filtered out for security. Requires a valid SessionID parameter.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what session information is returned and explicitly states the required SessionID parameter. Added details about return value structure and security filtering to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be available after the call.

message: Operation 'TicketCreate' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too brief about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies what ticket properties can be set, clarifies that an initial article is required/included, and explicitly states the return values (ticket ID, ticket number, article ID). This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow and what data will be available after creation.

data.current_description: Creates a new ticket with an initial article. Supports dynamic fields and attachments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ticket with an initial article. Accepts ticket properties (title, queue, type, priority, etc.), an initial article content, optional dynamic field values, and file attachments. Returns the newly created ticket ID, ticket number, and article ID. The ticket is immediately available for subsequent operations.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version specifies what ticket properties can be set, clarifies that an initial article is required/included, and explicitly states the return values (ticket ID, ticket number, article ID). This helps AI agents understand the complete operation flow and what data will be available after creation.

message: Operation 'TicketSearch' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks detail about what search criteria are available and how to customize results. Enhanced version mentions the breadth of search parameters (35 available), clarifies the return format (array of IDs), and explains customization options for sorting and pagination. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

data.current_description: Searches for tickets matching the specified criteria. Returns an array of matching ticket IDs. Default sort is by Age descending with a limit of 500 results.
data.description_suggestion: Searches for tickets matching specified criteria such as state, priority, queue, customer, or custom attributes. Returns an array of matching ticket IDs sorted by Age descending (default). Supports up to 35 search parameters for flexible filtering. Default result limit is 500 tickets. Pagination and custom sorting can be configured via parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what search criteria are available and how to customize results. Enhanced version mentions the breadth of search parameters (35 available), clarifies the return format (array of IDs), and explains customization options for sorting and pagination. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

message: Operation 'TicketGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that TicketID is required, specifies what optional data can be included (articles with type filtering, dynamic fields, attachments), and explains the return structure. This helps AI agents understand what data is available and how to request specific information.

data.current_description: Retrieves detailed information about one or more tickets, optionally including articles, dynamic fields, and attachments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for one or more tickets by ticket ID. Returns core ticket properties and optionally includes articles (communications), dynamic field values, and file attachments based on parameters. Supports filtering articles by type and retrieving specific article content. Requires valid TicketID parameter(s).
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that TicketID is required, specifies what optional data can be included (articles with type filtering, dynamic fields, attachments), and explains the return structure. This helps AI agents understand what data is available and how to request specific information.

message: Operation 'TicketHistoryGet' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about what history information is returned and what inputs are required. Enhanced version specifies that TicketID is required, clarifies the return format (chronological history entries with timestamps), explains what types of events are tracked, and reinforces the authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and access restrictions.

data.current_description: Retrieves the complete history of changes and events for one or more tickets. Requires agent authentication (not available to customer users).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete history of changes and events for one or more tickets by ticket ID, including state changes, property modifications, and article additions. Returns a chronological list of history entries with timestamps and details of each change. Requires agent authentication (not available to customer users). Supports filtering by ticket ID and optional parameters for customization.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what history information is returned and what inputs are required. Enhanced version specifies that TicketID is required, clarifies the return format (chronological history entries with timestamps), explains what types of events are tracked, and reinforces the authentication requirement. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and access restrictions.
